form:Form.name: EXPORT.form

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_organigrama, T.c_organigrama, T.d_organigrama from WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as T where T.l_automatica=0 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_organigrama, T.c_organigrama, T.d_organigrama, T.e_version from WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as T, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as O join T.c_organigrama inner O.c_organigrama where T.l_automatica=1 and O.oi_organigrama={$PARAM/@oi_organigrama} order by e_version DESC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_wf, T.c_wf, T.d_wf from WRK01_WF as T where T.l_automatica=0 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_wf, T.c_wf, T.d_wf, T.e_version from WRK01_WF as T, WRK01_WF as O join T.c_wf inner O.c_wf where T.l_automatica=1 and O.oi_wf={$PARAM/@oi_wf} order by e_version DESC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_int_mag, T.c_int_mag, T.d_int_mag from WRK04_INT_MAN as T ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1_WRK
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_wf as oi_wf, T.c_wf as c_wf, T.d_wf as d_wf, T.e_version as e_version, T.l_automatica as l_automatica FROM WRK01_WF as T WHERE T.oi_wf = {substring-after($PARAM/@value,\':\')} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1_ORG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_organigrama as oi_organigrama, T.c_organigrama as c_organigrama, T.d_organigrama as d_organigrama, T.e_version as e_version, T.l_automatica as l_automatica FROM WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as T WHERE T.oi_organigrama = {substring-after($PARAM/@value,\':\')} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1_INT
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_int_mag as oi_int_mag, T.c_int_mag as c_int_mag, T.d_int_mag as d_int_mag FROM WRK04_INT_MAN as T WHERE T.oi_int_mag = {substring-after($PARAM/@value,\':\')} ')/ROWS/ROW
